rationale: The citing paper’s core mechanism is that scheduling can shift leisure from an end in itself to a work-like/means-oriented construal, reducing utility, while the cited paper directly theorizes and tests “end vs means” motivational framing (experiential vs instrumental) and downstream motivation. Given this clear conceptual overlap and potential theory/mechanism relevance, the pair is not safely an incidental mention despite lacking in-text citation context in the raw evidence.
